call.argument: Imports all files from public/var/assets to Pimcore assets
Display information about the current project
Install bundle's web assets under a public directory
Invalidate cache tags for all or a specific pool
Delete an item from a cache pool
Dump the current configuration for an extension
Dump the default configuration for an extension
Display current services for an application
Ensure that arguments injected into services match type declarations
List classes/interfaces you can use for autowiring
List all dotenv files with variables and values
Display configured listeners for an application
Prepare the required infrastructure for the transport
List messages you can dispatch using the message buses
Stop workers after their current message
Show the message count for one or more transports
Display current routes for an application
Help debug routes by simulating a path info match
Extract missing translations keys from code to translation files
Pull translations from a given provider.
Push translations to a given provider.
Lint an XLIFF file and outputs encountered errors
Lint a YAML file and outputs encountered errors
Set a secret in the vault
Remove a secret from the vault
Decrypt all secrets and stores them in the local vault
Encrypt all local secrets to the vault
Test Mailer transports by sending an email

service.deprecated: The "%service_id%" service is deprecated without replacement.
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated without replacement.
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated without replacement.
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated without replacement.
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated without replacement.

service.argument: Please set the "framework.uid.name_based_uuid_namespace" configuration option to use the "name_based_uuid.factory" service
A string or a connection object

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Invalid service "messenger.transport.sqs.factory": class "Symfony\Component\Messenger\Bridge\AmazonSqs\Transport\AmazonSqsTransportFactory" does not exist.

service.deprecated: The "%service_id%" service is deprecated, use the "Symfony\Component\Console\Command\SignalableCommandInterface" instead.

call.argument: Display information about your security firewall(s)
Show a list of twig functions, filters, globals and tests
Lint a Twig template and outputs encountered errors
Generate a migration by comparing your current database to your mapping information.
Ensures that the metadata storage is at the latest version.
Display a list of all available migrations and their status.
Dump the schema for your database to a migration.
Execute one or more migration versions up or down manually.
Execute a migration to a specified version or the latest available version.
Rollup migrations by deleting all tracked versions and insert the one version that exists.
View the status of a set of migrations.
Tells you if your schema is up-to-date.
Manually add and delete migration versions from the version table.
Dumps exposed routes to the filesystem
Displays currently exposed routes for an application
Start a dump server that collects and displays dumps in a single place
Start a log server that displays logs in real time
Re-indexes the backend search of pimcore

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Pimcore\Resolver\ClassResolver": argument "$map" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "array", you should configure its value explicitly.

call.argument: Re-generates checksum for specific or all assets
Removes a custom setting from assets
rebuilds php files for classes, field collections and object bricks based on updated var/classes/definition_*.php files
rebuilds db structure for classes, field collections and object bricks based on updated var/classes/definition_*.php files
Import quantity value units from a JSON export
Delete unused locale(invalid language) tables & views
Cleans up unused document types. Removes type from enums and tables if exist
Generates the previews shown in the tree on hover
Migrates document elements to editables. See issue https://github.com/pimcore/pimcore/issues/7384 first
Regenerates low-quality image previews for all image assets
Asynchronous maintenance jobs of pimcore (needs to be set up as cron job)
Migrate data from one storage to another

Change thumbnail folder structure to <asset storage>/<path to asset>/<asset id>/image-thumb__<asset id>__<thumbnail name>/<asset filename> instead of <asset storage>/<path to asset>/image-thumb__<asset id>__<thumbnail name>/<asset filename>
Run a specific PHP script in an initialized Pimcore environment
Clear certain image or video thumbnails (temp. files)
Generate image thumbnails, useful to pre-generate thumbnails in the background
Generate video thumbnails, useful to pre-generate thumbnails in the background

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.KAPXGPI": it references class "Pimcore\HttpKernel\BundleCollection\BundleCollection" but no such service exists.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.y4_Zrx.": it needs an instance of "Symfony\Component\Config\Loader\LoaderInterface" but this type has been excluded from autowiring.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.vsLWZYc": it references class "Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Event\ControllerEvent" but no such service exists.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.EhhH0rI": it references class "Pimcore\Model\User" but no such service exists.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.4LxmfVi": it references interface "Pimcore\Model\Element\ElementInterface" but no such service exists. Did you create a class that implements this interface?

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.WwIVeH3": it references class "Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Event\ResponseEvent" but no such service exists.

Change thumbnail folder structure to <asset storage>/<path to asset>/<asset id>/image-thumb__<asset id>__<thumbnail name>/<asset filename> instead of <asset storage>/<path to asset>/image-thumb__<asset id>__<thumbnail name>/<asset filename>
Run a specific PHP script in an initialized Pimcore environment
Clear certain image or video thumbnails (temp. files)
Generate image thumbnails, useful to pre-generate thumbnails in the background

service.deprecated: The "%alias_id%" alias is deprecated, use "Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\UriSigner" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "routing.loader.attribute" service instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "routing.loader.attribute.directory" service instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "routing.loader.attribute.file" service instead.

The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, type-hint against "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerInterface" or implement "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerAwareInterface" instead.

The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, type-hint against "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerInterface" or implement "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerAwareInterface" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "Symfony\Component\Console\Command\SignalableCommandInterface" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, use "Symfony\Bundle\SecurityBundle\Security" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, use "Twig\Environment" or "twig" instead.
The "%alias_id%" alias is deprecated, use "Pimcore\Document\Renderer\DocumentRendererInterface" instead.
The "%alias_id%" alias is deprecated, use "Pimcore\Localization\LocaleServiceInterface" instead.
The "%alias_id%" alias is deprecated, use "Pimcore\Localization\LocaleServiceInterface" instead.
